creator: midom@dammit.lt
text:
Cisco has released a new version of TACACS+ daemon.

Fix: 

apply the patch.
How-To-Repeat: 
diff -urN tac_plus4.old/Makefile tac_plus4/Makefile
--- tac_plus4.old/Makefile	Tue Jul 18 21:20:27 2000
+++ tac_plus4/Makefile	Tue Jul 18 21:20:43 2000
@@ -6,10 +6,10 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	tac_plus
-PORTVERSION=	F4.0.3
+PORTVERSION=	F4.0.4
 CATEGORIES=	net
 MASTER_SITES=	ftp://ftp-eng.cisco.com/pub/tacacs/
-DISTNAME=	tac_plus.F4.0.3.alpha
+DISTNAME=	tac_plus.F4.0.4.alpha
 EXTRACT_SUFX=	.tar.Z
 
 MAINTAINER=	tasic@lucky.net
diff -urN tac_plus4.old/files/md5 tac_plus4/files/md5
--- tac_plus4.old/files/md5	Tue Jul 18 21:20:27 2000
+++ tac_plus4/files/md5	Tue Jul 18 21:22:58 2000
@@ -1 +1 @@
-MD5 (tac_plus.F4.0.3.alpha.tar.Z) = 451d92503b5832a848c1b76ce58a4636
+MD5 (tac_plus.F4.0.4.alpha.tar.Z) = 7acaa4a78c71c514cf67ca5a77e16c27
diff -urN tac_plus4.old/patches/patch-ad tac_plus4/patches/patch-ad
--- tac_plus4.old/patches/patch-ad	Tue Jul 18 21:20:27 2000
+++ tac_plus4/patches/patch-ad	Thu Jan  1 03:00:00 1970
@@ -1,10 +0,0 @@
---- config.c.orig	Tue Nov  9 22:00:07 1999
-+++ config.c	Tue Nov  9 22:00:19 1999
-@@ -1418,7 +1418,6 @@
-     if ((cf = fopen(cfile, "r")) == NULL) {
- 	report(LOG_ERR, "read_config: fopen() error for file %s %s, exiting",
- 	       cfile, sys_errlist[errno]);
--	fclose(cf);
- 	return (1);
-     }
-     if (parse_decls() || sym_error) {
